zh.lifeSummary: 當William Holt於1479年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾海伍德時，他的父親Edward Del Holte25歲，母親Dorothy Ferrers25歲。他於1509年與Dorothy Ashton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛達爾享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Holt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

variants.name: Hohlt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ordell.
North German: variant of Holt with the additional h reflecting the lengthened vowel or a variant of Hohl with the addition of excrescent -t.
Scandinavian: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Nils.

Dutch (also Van Holten) and North German: habitational name from any of the places so called, from Low German holt ‘holt, copse, small wood’. There are two in the Dutch province of Overijssel and another near Oberhausen in the Rhineland.
Danish: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holtan
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from the definite plural form of holt ‘small wood’ (see Holt ).

variants.name: Holter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Selmer, Hilmar, Knute, Lars.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southeastern Norway, from the indefinite plural of holt ‘holt, small wood’ (see Holt ).
North German (also Hölter): habitational name for someone from any of several places in Westphalia called Hölt and Holt (see Holt ). Compare Hoelter .

variants.name: Holtman
meanings: Dutch: variant of Holt + man ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Holtmann  .

variants.name: Holtmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Udo, Aloys, Hans, Heinz.
North German: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: variant of   Holt  .
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Hoult
meanings: English: variant of   Holt  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Holt was born in 1479, in Heywood, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Del Holte, was 25 and his mother, Dorothy Ferrers, was 25. He married Dorothy Ashton in 1509, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1556, in Rochdale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

ja.lifeSummary: William Holtが1479年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヘイウッドで生まれた時，父Edward Del Holteは25歳，母Dorothy Ferrersは25歳であった。1509年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンでDorothy Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアロチダルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Holt(이)가 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 헤이우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Del Holte(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Ferrers(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 Dorothy Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 록h데일에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Holt родился в 1479 г. в местности хивуд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edward Del Holte было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Ferrers, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Ashton в 1509 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1556 г. в местности рочдеил, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
